description_long: This object is a modern flat-panel computer monitor with a large, rectangular display area framed by a thin, black bezel. The screen dominates the front view, with a matte finish that reduces glare. The monitor is supported by a compact, rectangular stand that appears to be made of metal or sturdy plastic, with a small base footprint. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports or buttons, and the stand is attached centrally. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements on the bezel or stand. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for office or home environments.
description: A sleek, flat-panel computer monitor with a thin black bezel and a compact rectangular stand, featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, black display area with a thin bezel and the small stand visible below the screen.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the monitor's slim profile and the flat, rectangular base of the stand.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain back of the monitor, with no visible ports, buttons, or logos.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the thinness of the monitor and the compactness of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a matte finish with sharp corners and no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a compact, rectangular flat base, likely made of metal or sturdy plastic, with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A small cluster of buttons is visible on the lower right side of the monitor's front bezel.
